title: Ability to Move Subitems Between Boards!

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is critical to our workflow. We have >50 boards and all tasks are Subitems under various Items in all of those boards.

Really need to be able to move Subitems between boards.

If anyone knows how to do this please let me know, otherwise - major feature request!

Thanks

posts.author: kimmp (Kim Freeman)
posts.cookedHtml: SO weird, because we’ve been able to move subitems to other boards for a long time, but suddenly today we found that we aren’t able to any more. I was looking for other community feedback and found your post, which indicates others have not been able to do this. I’m really confused as to how we were able to for so long.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @meddle01 & @kimmp,

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. It also includes the ability to move subitems between boards, here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-05 at 16.49.332134×432 52.1 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
